entry.title: Z Lab's DFlash Hits 4.3x Throughput by Drafting Tokens in Parallel
entry.summary: LMSYS, Z Lab, and Modal jointly release DFlash + Spec V2, hitting 4.3x baseline throughput and becoming SGLang's new default speculative decoding engine

entry.title: Vercel's v0 Ships Agent Skills So AI Stops Forgetting Your Stack
entry.summary: v0 now lets you attach reusable agent skills directly from the prompt bar, pulling from skills.sh, your saved library, or your own repo

entry.title: Lovable Ships a Preview Toolbar So You Click Instead of Describe
entry.summary: Lovable's new preview toolbar replaces its old visual editor with four direct-manipulation modes, including free inline text edits and team comments pinned to your live app.

entry.title: Remotion Turns Its React Video Framework Into a Drag-and-Drop Studio
entry.summary: Remotion Studio now lets you click, drag, and resize elements on the canvas, with every change writing back to your source code automatically.

entry.title: Sarvam AI Raises $234M to Build India's First Sovereign AI Stack
entry.summary: Sarvam AI closes $234M of a $300M Series B at a $1.5B valuation, with HCLTech anchoring a $150M bet on India's sovereign AI stack

entry.title: Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code Hits 260 Tokens per Second at 6x Speed
entry.summary: Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code gets a HighSpeed mode hitting 180â260 tok/s, making trillion-parameter agentic coding dramatically more responsive

entry.title: vLLM v0.23.0 Ships DeepSeek-V4 Production Hardening and 56% Throughput Boost
entry.summary: vLLM v0.23.0 ships 408 commits from 200 contributors, maturing DeepSeek-V4 support, expanding Model Runner V2, and adding multi-tier KV cache offloading to object stores.

entry.title: Sakana AI's Marlin Replaces Entire Research Teams With 8-Hour Autonomous Sessions
entry.summary: Sakana AI's first commercial product uses multi-model tree search to run autonomous strategy research sessions up to 8 hours long

entry.title: Suno Rebuilds Stem Separation From Scratch, Hitting 90% Accuracy
entry.summary: Suno's revamped stem separation now regenerates individual tracks from scratch, delivering artifact-free audio ready for professional DAW workflows.

entry.title: Databricks Open-Sources Omnigent to Unify and Govern Multiple AI Agents
entry.summary: Databricks open-sources Omnigent, a meta-harness that unifies Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents under one shared layer for composition, control, and real-time collaboration.

entry.title: Warp Lets SuperGrok Subscribers Run xAI's Grok Build 0.1 Free
entry.summary: Warp's AI terminal agent now connects directly to SuperGrok subscriptions, unlocking Grok Build 0.1 â xAI's purpose-built agentic coding model â without burning Warp credits.

entry.title: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 Hits 1M Context Window to Challenge Claude Code
entry.summary: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 arrives as the new coding flagship with 1M-context support, two thinking-effort modes, and a full open-source MIT release coming next week
